title: 9-B: Server compatibility
description: Verify and fix federation compatibility against each major ActivityPub server implementation: mastodon.social (canonical), GoToSocial, Misskey/Sharkey, Pleroma/Akkoma, and Lemmy/Pixelfed smoke tests. Each sub-issue owns one implementation row in docs/compat.md.
close_reason: AP compliance verified: 12/12 go-fed, 18/18 FediTest, 93/93 Pasture vectors
